name: OpenAI Multi-Auth Doc Fixup
user_issue: All 1 account(s) failed (server errors or auth issues) when using OpenAI models
root_cause: Burned refresh token in global auth fallback (Layer 1). Plugin multi-account storage (Layer 2) was empty. User had reauthorized 3 accounts via repeated `opencode auth login` calls, each of which rotated the refresh token, burning earlier ones. Only the last login's token survived in the single-entry global auth.json.
resolution: Re-authorized all 3 accounts through the plugin's multi-account flow. All accounts now stored in plugin storage with rotation, health-aware failover, and per-account cooldowns active.
